productDisplayName: Puma Men's Complete Itana Silver Black Red Shoes
description: Get used to maximum comfort and performance during runs with these Complete Itana shoes from puma. Equipped with patented M2D Technology for added stability, these shoes work as hard as you to  help you run longer and stronger. Upper Sandwich mesh material for a high degree of breathability, lowering the risk of blistering Reflective elements to allow secure running in low light conditions Synthetic overlays in formstripe and cat logo design for secure Fit and style Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Midsole IdCELL, a low-density cushioning unit to improve shock absorption and protect the feet KMS Lite midsole that provides better cushioning and reduces weight Outsole ArchTec guides the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Decoupled Heel Construction to distribute impact, allowing for a softer motion duoCELL, a long-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorption EverRide, a blown rubber outsole reducing weight and improving forefoot cushioning EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas M2D, a second density on the medial side to stabilize the foot during the stance phase
